name: BurtCanStatus
desc: No 0 value to ensure we always set a status

name: MTU_ERROR
desc: CANFD errors

name: SOCKET_CREATE_ERROR
desc: Errors when opening and closing

name: WRITE_ERROR
desc: IO errors

name: BurtFirmwareSerial
desc: Represents a firmware device connected over Serial.

name: BurtFirmwareSerial
desc: Creates a firmware device at the given serial port.

name: device
desc: The name of this device.

name: dispose
desc: Resets the device and closes the port.

name: handshakeDelay
desc: How long it should take for a firmware device to respond to a handshake.

name: init
desc: Opens the serial port and executes the handshake with the device, then starts listening.

name: isReady
desc: Whether this device has passed the handshake.

name: port
desc: The port this device is attached to.

name: readInterval
desc: The interval to read serial data at.

name: resetCode
desc: The reset code to send to a firmware device.

name: sendBytes
desc: Sends bytes to the device via Serial.

name: stream
desc: The stream of incoming data.

name: CanBindings
desc: Bindings for src/burt_can.

name: CanBindings
desc: The symbols are looked up in dynamicLibrary.

name: CanBindings.fromLookup
desc: The symbols are looked up with lookup.

name: CanException
desc: An exception that occurred while working with the CAN bus -- see BurtCanStatus.

name: CanException
desc: A const constructor

name: message
desc: The error that occured, using getCanError.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: CanFFI
desc: The CAN interface, backed by the native SocketCAN library on Linux.

name: dispose
desc: Disposes of native resources allocated to this object, and stops listening for CAN messages.

name: hasError
desc: Whether there was an error and CAN is not functioning.

name: incomingMessages
desc: A stream of incoming CAN messages. Use Stream.listen to handle them.

name: init
desc: Starts listening for CAN messages.

name: readInterval
desc: How often to poll CAN messages.

name: reset
desc: Resets the CAN bus.

name: sendMessage
desc: Sends a CAN message with the given ID and data.

name: CanHandler
desc: A function that handles a CanMessage.

name: CanMessage
desc: A wrapper around a NativeCanMessage.

name: CanMessage
desc: Allocates a NativeCanMessage and holds a reference to its pointer.

name: data
desc: Allows you to access a native char* as a Uint8List.

name: dispose
desc: Frees the CanMessage struct that was natively allocated.

name: CanMessage.fromPointer
desc: Stores a reference to a NativeCanMessage and where it was allocated.

name: id
desc: The ID of the message.

name: isNative
desc: Whether the resources were allocated by Dart or natively, which deteremines how to dispose.

name: length
desc: The length of the message.

name: pointer
desc: The pointer to the NativeCanMessage struct backing this object.

name: CanSocket
desc: A CAN socket that supports reading and writing CAN messages.

name: CanSocket
desc: Chooses the right implementation for the platform. Uses a stub on non-Linux platforms.

name: dispose
desc: Disposes of native resources allocated to this object, and stops listening for CAN messages.

name: incomingMessages
desc: A stream of incoming CAN messages. Use Stream.listen to handle them.

name: init
desc: Starts listening for CAN messages.

name: reset
desc: Resets the CAN bus.

name: sendMessage
desc: Sends a CAN message with the given ID and data.

name: CanStub
desc: An implementation of the CAN interface that does nothing for platforms that don't support it.

name: CanStub
desc: Creates a mock CAN interface that does nothing and receives no messages.

name: dispose
desc: Disposes of native resources allocated to this object, and stops listening for CAN messages.

name: incomingMessages
desc: A stream of incoming CAN messages. Use Stream.listen to handle them.

name: init
desc: Starts listening for CAN messages.

name: reset
desc: Resets the CAN bus.

name: sendMessage
desc: Sends a CAN message with the given ID and data.

name: GpsReader
desc: Listens to the GPS and sends its output to the Dashboard.

name: device
desc: The serial device representing the GPS.

name: dispose
desc: Closes the device and stops listening to the GPS.

name: handleLine
desc: Parses a line of NMEA output and sends the GPS coordinates to the dashboard.

name: handlePacket
desc: Parses a packet into several NMEA sentences and handles them.

name: init
desc: Starts reading the GPS (on serialPort) through the cat Linux program.

name: parseNMEA
desc: Parses an NMEA sentence into a GpsCoordinates object.

name: ImuReader
desc: A service to read orientation data from the connected IMU.

name: dispose
desc: Stops listening to the serial port.

name: handleOsc
desc: Parses an OSC bundle from a list of bytes.

name: init
desc: Starts listening to the IMU.

name: serial
desc: The device that reads from the serial port.

name: subscription
desc: The subscription that will be notified when a new serial packet arrives.

name: SerialDevice
desc: A wrapper around the package:libserialport library.

name: SerialDevice
desc: Manages a connection to a serial device. See allPorts.

name: allPorts
desc: A list of all available ports on the device.

name: dispose
desc: Closes the port and frees any allocated resources associated with it.

name: isOpen
desc: Whether the port is open (ie, the device is connected).

name: open
desc: Opens the port and begins reading from it.

name: portName
desc: The port to connect to.

name: readBytes
desc: Reads bytes from the port. If count is provided, only reads that number of bytes.

name: readInterval
desc: How often to read from the port.

name: startListening
desc: Starts listening to data sent over the serial port via stream.

name: stopListening
desc: Stops listening to the serial port.

name: stream
desc: All incoming bytes coming from the port.

name: write
desc: Writes data to the port.

name: SerialPortUnavailable
desc: An error that is thrown when a serial port cannot be opened.

name: SerialPortUnavailable
desc: A const constructor.

name: port
desc: The port that did not open.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SerialReadException
desc: Indicates that some unknown error occurred while reading a serial port.

name: SerialReadException
desc: A const constructor.

name: error
desc: The error that occurred.

name: port
desc: The port that caused the error.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: SubsystemsCollection
desc: Contains all the resources needed by the subsystems program.

name: can
desc: The CAN bus socket.

name: dispose
desc: Disposes all the resources needed by the subsystems.

name: gps
desc: The GPS reader.

name: imu
desc: The IMU reader.

name: init
desc: Initializes all the resources needed by the subsystems.

name: serial
desc: The Serial service.

name: server
desc: The UDP server.

name: SubsystemsServer
desc: A UDP server to connect to the dashboard.

name: SubsystemsServer
desc: Creates a Subsystems server on the given port.

name: checkHeartbeats
desc: Checks if a heartbeat has been received. If not, calls onDisconnect.

name: didReceivedHeartbeat
desc: Whether this socket received a heartbeat since the last call to checkHeartbeats.

name: dispose
desc: Closes the socket.

name: heartbeatInterval
desc: How often to check for heartbeats.

name: heartbeatTimer
desc: A timer to call checkHeartbeats every heartbeatInterval.

name: init
desc: Initializes the socket, and restarts it if a known "safe" error occurs (see allowedErrors).

name: onConnect
desc: Sets destination to the incoming source.

name: onData
desc: Override this function to process incoming data, along with the source address and port.

name: onDisconnect
desc: Sends a Disconnect message to the dashboard and sets destination to null.

name: onHeartbeat
desc: Handles incoming heartbeats.

name: port
desc: The port this socket is listening on. See RawDatagramSocket.bind.

name: quiet
desc: Whether to silence "normal" output, like opening/closing and resetting sockets.

name: sendData
desc: Sends data to the given destination.

name: sendLog
desc: Sends a log message or saves it until a Dashboard is connected.

name: sendWrapper
desc: Sends an already-wrapped WrappedMessage to the destination, or the given destinationOverride.

name: canInterface
desc: The CAN interface to use.

name: canTimeout
desc: The timeout, in seconds, to wait for each message.

name: canType
desc: The CAN type to use -- CAN or CAN FD.

name: collection
desc: The collection of all the subsystem's resources.

name: getCanError
desc: These values come from the BurtCanStatus enum.

name: logger
desc: A logger that prints to the terminal and sends a UDP message.

name: nativeLib
desc: The native SocketCAN-based library.

name: port
desc: The serial port that the IMU is connected to.

name: serialPort
desc: The port/device file to listen to the GPS on.
